assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 1-4: YAML frontmatter delimited by --- with name: pandas-data-cleaning and a description field present.

assertion_results.text: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning data cleaning or pandas
assertion_results.evidence: Description contains literal 'Use when the user mentions data cleaning, data wrangling, data prep, messy data, missing values, NaN handling, duplicates...'.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers handling missing values with code examples
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 79-103: '### 3. Handle missing values' section with strategy table (fillna median, fillna Unknown, dropna) and code examples showing before/after missing value counts.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers deduplication with code examples
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 105-121: '### 4. Deduplicate' section with code examples for exact duplicates (drop_duplicates()) and near-duplicates (sort_values + drop_duplicates with subset and keep params).

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers column name normalization or type conversion
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 60-77: '### 2. Normalize column names' with snake_case code. Lines 124-145: '### 5. Convert types' with code for datetime, numeric, category, and boolean conversions.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body uses progressive disclosure by referencing separate files for detailed patterns
assertion_results.evidence: Line 83: references '[references/missing-value-strategies.md](references/missing-value-strategies.md)' for the full decision tree. The file exists in the output directory.

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3) covering customer CSV cleaning, sensor parquet cleaning, and CRM export cleaning.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 210: '## Common mistakes' section with a 7-row table covering blanket fillna, inplace=True, missing subset, type conversion order, etc.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a workflow or ordered checklist for the cleaning pipeline
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 35-159: Numbered workflow '### 1. Load and inspect' through '### 6. Validate and save'. Lines 161-169: Checklist with 7 items covering the full pipeline.
